allow: Bash(cd /home/yongyan/Desktop/vpn/vpn-manager && for f in config.py utils.py database.py singbox.py services.py server.py dashboard.py cli.py main.py; do echo "=== $f ===" && python3 -c "import py_compile; py_compile.compile\('$f', doraise=True\)" 2>&1 && echo "OK" || echo "FAIL"; done)

Bash(echo "=== File sizes ===" && wc -l *.py | sort -n && echo "" && echo "=== Final compile check ===" && python3 -c "
import py_compile, glob
ok = 0
for f in sorted\(glob.glob\('*.py'\)\):
    try:
        py_compile.compile\(f, doraise=True\)
        ok += 1
    except py_compile.PyCompileError as e:
        print\(f'FAIL: {f}: {e}'\)
print\(f'All {ok} files compiled successfully'\)
")
